overview: KLU Spotter is a real-time empty room finder for KL University students. It features a dramatic animated entry screen, Internet Identity login, and a live room availability grid that shows which rooms are free right now based on the current session time.
features: Animated entry screen with sliding red rectangles and burst login popup
Semester (Even/Odd) and Cluster (C1/C2) filter controls with holiday rules
Session-based scheduling engine covering S1-S13 (7:10 AM to 7:20 PM)
Real-time empty room grid with color-coded status (green=empty, red=occupied)
Room categories by campus block: R-Block, C-Block, M-Block
